summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Watchlist feature. Fixed backend route ordering bug for /watchlist/all endpoint. All 18 backend API tests pass. All frontend UI features verified working correctly with MongoDB persistence.

ui_bugs.issue: HTML nesting warning: button inside button for star icon
ui_bugs.note: Does not affect functionality, just a React hydration warning

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/watchlist returns empty list when no items
Backend: POST /api/watchlist adds stock with correct fields (id, symbol, name, source, added_at)
Backend: POST /api/watchlist prevents duplicate stocks
Backend: POST /api/watchlist rejects invalid stock symbols
Backend: POST /api/watchlist supports 'trading' source
Backend: POST /api/watchlist supports 'investments' source
Backend: GET /api/watchlist returns enriched data (price, change_pct, signal, category, sector)
Backend: GET /api/watchlist/check/{symbol} returns true for existing stocks
Backend: GET /api/watchlist/check/{symbol} returns false for non-existing stocks
Backend: DELETE /api/watchlist/{symbol} removes stock successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/watchlist/{symbol} handles non-existent stock gracefully
Backend: PUT /api/watchlist/{symbol}/note updates note correctly
Backend: POST /api/watchlist/refresh refreshes all items with latest data
Backend: DELETE /api/watchlist/all clears entire watchlist
Backend: Watchlist persists across multiple requests (MongoDB)
Backend: Symbol handling is case insensitive
Backend: Watchlist items get investment signal data when available
Backend: Full workflow (add -> view -> update note -> refresh -> remove) works
Frontend: Watchlist page renders with header, stats cards, and tips
Frontend: Quick add input accepts symbol and adds to watchlist
Frontend: Star icons appear on Investment cards (30 found)
Frontend: Star icons appear on Trading cards (5 found in High Volume tab)
Frontend: Clicking star adds stock to watchlist with toast notification
Frontend: Clicking filled star removes stock from watchlist
Frontend: Watchlist displays: symbol, name, signal, score, category, price, change%, upside, confidence, sector
Frontend: Note editing works on watchlist cards
Frontend: Filter input filters watchlist items
Frontend: Refresh button updates prices
Frontend: Clear All button present and functional
Frontend: Remove button (trash icon) removes individual stocks
Frontend: Watchlist persists across page navigation
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed backend route ordering bug: /watchlist/all was being matched by /watchlist/{symbol} - moved /watchlist/all before the parameterized route
All watchlist CRUD operations working correctly with MongoDB persistence
Star icon integration on Investment and Trading cards working correctly
Toast notifications showing for add/remove actions
Note editing feature working with inline save/cancel
seed_data_creation: None required - watchlist uses real-time FMP API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Watchlist feature fully tested and working. Backend API supports: add (POST /watchlist), remove (DELETE /watchlist/{symbol}), check (GET /watchlist/check/{symbol}), refresh (POST /watchlist/refresh), clear all (DELETE /watchlist/all), update note (PUT /watchlist/{symbol}/note). Frontend has star icons on Investment and Trading cards. Watchlist page shows stats, filter, quick add, and individual stock cards with all required fields. Note: Trading page 'Hot' tab may be empty depending on market conditions - test with 'High Volume' or 'Avoid' tabs which have signals.

endpoints: GET /api/watchlist - List all with enriched data

page_elements: Stats cards (Total, Bullish, Bearish, Avg Score)

star_icon_integration.investments_page: Star icons on all InvestmentCard components
star_icon_integration.trading_page: Star icons on all TradingCard components
star_icon_integration.add_action: Click empty star -> adds to watchlist with toast
star_icon_integration.remove_action: Click filled star -> removes from watchlist with toast
